posts.author: DustinIngram (Dustin Ingram)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to see the activity log shown under the updates to show all change when the item is being duplicated, moved from board to board, etc. I would like the activity to be treated like the comments and it to stay with the item, no matter what we do with the item.

What are you trying to achieve

We would like the activity to track through with the item start to finish so that we end up with a complete repository of all that has happened with an item all in one place at the end of the job.
